# task-header

## Plugin reference

- Description: Top section of the task detail pane: editable title, status chip, hold/drop buttons, author, auto-start, and Launch buttons.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `TaskDetailSlots.Section` "header" → `TaskHeader`
